task_context.ai_prompt_hint: Summarise overall score, pass/fail status, class benchmark, percentile, and the most useful next action based only on returned fields.

explanation.raw_text:
Summary: You are currently passing with an average score of 41.25, which is below the class average of 58.31. Your performance places you in the 8.8th percentile, indicating that most students are scoring higher than you.

Insights: Below Class Average: Your average score of 41.25 is significantly lower than the class average of 58.31, suggesting that there is room for improvement in your understanding of the material. | Low Percentile Ranking: With a score percentile of 8.8, you are in the lower range compared to your classmates, which highlights the need for focused study and practice.

Educational implications: Improving your understanding of the material will help raise your average score and percentile ranking.

Recommendations: high - Engage in targeted study sessions focusing on areas where you struggle. - This will help you improve your scores and better understand the material, leading to higher performance.

required_core_outputs.description: State the overall score and pass/fail status.

required_supporting_outputs.description: Compare against the class benchmark when class benchmark fields are present.
Report percentile standing when score_percentile is present.
Suggest the most useful next action supported by returned fields.

evaluation_constraints.description: Use only returned fields; do not fill missing benchmark or percentile values with invented estimates.
If percentile data is absent, omit percentile comparison and state that it is unavailable when relevant.

evaluation_requirements.safety_fairness_note: Conservative pilot default; human review is required before any not_applicable exception.
